message:
fix(analysis): stabilize history event ordering and guard what-if top_n=0

History: extract history_event_order() sort key that prioritizes "created"
events first (tier 0), then "updated"/"closed" by timestamp (tier 1),
then "dependency" events last (tier 2). Fixes event reordering when
created_at is None. New test: created_event_stays_first_even_without_created_timestamp.

What-if: early-return empty vec for top_n=0 instead of relying on
truncate-after-sort, simplifying the control flow. New test:
what_if_zero_top_n_returns_no_results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
